description: Document remaining automation execution, performance, rule, template, statistics, and bulk-operation routes with source-grounded schemas and auth/RBAC metadata.
Document contract-line and contract-line-template routes, including bulk operations, service associations, activation, analytics, copy, fixed config, and usage metrics.
Document category routes for service categories, ticket categories, trees, move operations, search, analytics, and bulk delete.
Document client, client-contract-line, contact, and related location/contact subresource routes.
Document financial, billing analytics, invoices, credits, transactions, payment terms, billing calculation, bulk invoice, and invoice lifecycle routes.
Document QuickBooks and integration duplicate route families under /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks and /api/v1/quickbooks, including mapping, connection, import, sync, and catalog endpoints.
Document webhook route family including CRUD, analytics, events, deliveries, testing, retry, subscription, and bulk endpoints.
Document workflow route family including CRUD, events, execution, templates, validation, analytics, import/export, and versioning endpoints.
Document user, user-role, role, permission, permission-check, RBAC audit/analytics, teams, and team membership/hierarchy route families.
Document project, ticket, tag, schedule, time-entry, time-sheet, time-period, and time approval route families.
Document quote and contract route families, including quote items, approval/send/convert flows, and contract-line associations.
Document meta, health-like v1 metadata, feature-access, feature-flag, user telemetry, test-auth, and remaining single-operation utility routes.
For every remaining operation, include path/query/header/body schemas with required fields and ID provenance grounded in route/controller/service code.
For every remaining operation, include response schemas, status codes, response-envelope shape, and known mismatches between implementation and existing Zod schemas.
For every remaining operation, document auth mechanism, tenant scoping, RBAC resource/action, middleware behavior, and current auth wiring gaps where applicable.
Document inventory-only or missing-handler route entries explicitly when route inventory refers to files that do not exist in the current worktree.
Keep registrar organization maintainable by adding domain-specific files under server/src/lib/api/openapi/routes and importing them in index.ts before inventory backfill.
Regenerate CE/legacy and EE OpenAPI JSON/YAML specs after each batch or logical group of batches.
Validate placeholder removal after each batch using a generated-spec scan for generated descriptions and x-placeholder metadata.
Maintain /tmp/alga-openapi-doc-progress.md with completed batches, selected next batch, remaining placeholder count, and model/provider issues.
Keep this plan's PRD, features, tests, and scratchpad synchronized as remaining route families are completed.
Commit and push source registrar and generated spec changes periodically, excluding pre-existing .env.localtest changes.
Perform final CE and EE zero-placeholder validation and record final counts/results in SCRATCHPAD.md and /tmp/alga-openapi-doc-progress.md.
Create a final summary of documented route families, discovered implementation gaps, and any intentionally deferred runtime fixes.
